task_completion.description: Access the specified tax documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File Explorer open to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\vance\' or a document viewer displaying tax documents for Eleanor Vance.

task_completion.description: Open StudioTax 2024 and start a return for Eleanor Vance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 application window is open, showing the personal information screen or a new return with the name 'Eleanor Vance' entered.

task_completion.description: Enter investment income and eligible dividends.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax interface showing T5 slip data entry or investment income forms being filled out.
StudioTax interface showing T5008 data entry screens or Schedule 3 (Capital Gains/Losses) with securities dispositions entered.

task_completion.description: Enter carrying charges (margin loan interest and investment counsel fees).
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax interface showing Schedule 4 or Line 22100 with entries for carrying charges, interest, or investment counsel fees.

task_completion.description: Save the tax return to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box pointing to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' with the filename 'eleanor_vance.24t', or the StudioTax main window title bar displaying 'eleanor_vance.24t'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the StudioTax 2024 GUI to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual StudioTax 2024 application interface being used, rather than a text editor or script modifying a .24t file directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: No Command Prompt or PowerShell windows are visible executing commands to echo, copy, or move pre-made .24t files into the target directory.

integrity.description: The agent navigated through the necessary tax forms and schedules.
integrity.visual_evidence: Sequential screenshots show progression through different StudioTax forms (e.g., Personal Info, T5, T5008, Schedule 3, Schedule 4) rather than a sudden jump to a completed state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Eleanor Vance. Province: ON. Expected Output File: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\eleanor_vance.24t. Key complexities to look for in the UI: Carrying charges (Line 22100) on Schedule 4 (specifically $18,250 margin interest and $7,100 counsel fees if visible), Multiple T5008 securities dispositions on Schedule 3, and Eligible dividend gross-up. Note: The task environment might be missing the actual document files due to a broken setup script, so partial attempts to find them or enter data based purely on the prompt should be evaluated based on UI navigation and intent.
